ddls:
CREATE TABLE "baselines" (
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baseline */,
  "baseline_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseline */,
  "baseline_description" TEXT /* Description of the baseline */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the baseline was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the baseline was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transects" (
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect */,
  "transect_name" TEXT /* Name of the transect */,
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baseline the transect belongs to */,
  "transect_description" TEXT /* Description of the transect */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transect was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transect was last updated */,
  "transect_length" REAL /* Length of the transect in meters */,
  "transect_width" REAL /* Width of the transect in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transects_baseline_id FOREIGN KEY ("baseline_id") REFERENCES baselines ("baseline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., lower, middle, upper) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the location was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the location was last updated */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., lower, middle, upper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the species was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the species was last updated */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of the species (e.g., plant, animal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species composition record */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect the composition data belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the composition data belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species in the composition */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the species in the composition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the composition data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the composition data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_composition_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_composition_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_composition_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hit_data" (
  "hit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hit data record */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect the hit data belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the hit data belongs to */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "hit_by_loc" INTEGER /* Number of hits by location */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the hit data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the hit data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hit_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hit_data_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the research project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the research project was last updated */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_transepts" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transect was added to the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transect was last updated in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "transect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transect_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transect */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transect_versions_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_versions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project member */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the member was added to the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the member's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_permissions" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
